mapper.select: SELECT r.id as id, r.product_id as productId, r.customer_id as customerId, r.order_id as orderId, r.rating as rating, r.title as title, r.body as body, r.verified_purchase as verifiedPurchase, r.helpful_count as helpfulCount, r.report_count as reportCount, r.moderator_notes as moderatorNotes, r.state_id as stateId, r.created_at as createdAt FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id as id, r.product_id as productId, r.customer_id as customerId, r.rating as rating, r.title as title, r.report_count as reportCount, r.moderator_notes as moderatorNotes, r.state_id as stateId, r.created_at as createdAt FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.state_id = 'FLAGGED' AND r.product_id = #{productId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.state_id = 'FLAGGED' AND r.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT r.id as id, r.product_id as productId, r.customer_id as customerId, r.rating as rating, r.title as title, r.body as body, r.verified_purchase as verifiedPurchase, r.report_count as reportCount, r.moderator_notes as moderatorNotes, r.state_id as stateId, r.created_at as createdAt FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.state_id IN ('UNDER_MODERATION', 'FLAGGED') AND r.state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.state_id IN ('UNDER_MODERATION', 'FLAGGED') AND r.state_id = #{stateId}

SELECT r.id as id, r.product_id as productId, r.customer_id as customerId, r.rating as rating, r.title as title, r.body as body, r.verified_purchase as verifiedPurchase, r.helpful_count as helpfulCount, r.state_id as stateId, r.created_at as createdAt FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED' ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT r.product_id as productId, ROUND(AVG(CAST(r.rating AS DOUBLE)), 2) as averageRating, count(*) as reviewCount FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED' GROUP BY r.product_id

SELECT r.id as id, r.product_id as productId, r.customer_id as customerId, r.rating as rating, r.title as title, r.body as body, r.verified_purchase as verifiedPurchase, r.helpful_count as helpfulCount, r.created_at as createdAt FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED'
